speaker: speaker1
text: Has your company been affected much by government legislation ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , we have . We've had to clean up our production process a lot to meet tough government standards .

speaker: speaker1
text: What about your use of raw materials ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , we've had to cut down the amount of solvents we use and we ’ re not allowed to use lead in our products any more .

speaker: speaker1
text: What happens if you exceed the limits ?

speaker: speaker2
text: We try not to because you might have to pay quite a heavy fine .
